rulings.Case Title: DAVID LO et al VS. DANIEL S LEE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Re Notice Of General And Special Demurrers By Daniel S. Lee And Junko Tanaka To First Amended Complaint Request For Dismissal With Prejudice
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 27, 2015 Line 1. DEFENDANT DANIEL LEE, JUNKO TANAKA Re Notice Of General And Special Demurrers By Daniel S. Lee And Junko Tanaka To First Amended Complaint Request For Dismissal With Prejudice Defendant's Motion to Strike First Amended Complaint is CONTINUED to May 21, 2015. Moving party failed to provide the Court with a courtesy copy of the motion and the operative complaint. (See SF Local Rules 2.6B, 2.6C.) Courtesy copies must be dropped off in Dept. 501 by 4 p.m. on May 11, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID JARAMILLO ET AL VS. BALWANTSINH THAKO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Plaintiffs For Financial Discovery On Defendant Balwantsinh Thakor
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 27, 2015 Line 2. PLAINTIFF ERIC BOICE, VINETTA BOICE, ELIZABETH CRUZ, ANGELA BRONTLEY, MARIA ACOSTA Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Plaintiffs For Financial Discovery On Defendant Balwantsinh Thakor Plaintiffs' Motion for Financial Discovery is DENIED. Plaintiffs failed to show a substantial probability of prevailing on the punitive damages claim. (Civ. Code, § 3295(c).) = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SYED ZAHID ALI VS. JAMES LORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 27, 2015 Line 3. DEFENDANT JAMES LORD DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Defendants' Demurrer to the Complaint is SUSTAINED with leave to amend. No opposition filed. Plaintiffs failed to plead sufficient facts to state a cause of action. (Code Civ. Pro., § 430.10, subd. (e).) = (501/REQ)
